entries.title: Complete assigned models, focusing on craftsmanship. Students work with cardboard to create 3-dimensional geometric shapes.

entries.content:
Grade 5 students who are new to sloyd should begin with Sloyd: Level 1 and then continue courses in sequence.

Prerequisite: Sloyd: Level 3
